notes: Snappier and cheaper. The Review tab now loads instantly — it only lists word packs up to your level instead of the whole course. The Today ring settles instantly instead of re-animating every visit. Continuing a lesson jumps straight to where you left off (no more flash of the first card). And under the hood the tutor now uses a lighter, cheaper model for Portuguese and French while keeping the stronger one for Croatian, where it's needed for correctness.
